'''kazofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadherence|coadherence]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-z-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadherence|coadherence]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kazofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæzefeth|kæzefeth]] || [[word:kæzefej|kæzefej]] || [[word:kæzefesh|kæzefesh]] || [[word:kæzefe|kæzefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kazozofoth|kazozofoth]] || [[word:kazozofoj|kazozofoj]] || [[word:kazozofosh|kazozofosh]] || [[word:kazozofo|kazozofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kazofoth|kazofoth]] || [[word:kazofoj|kazofoj]] || [[word:kazofosh|kazofosh]] || [[word:kazofo|kazofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kazoffofth|kazoffofth]] || [[word:kazoffofj|kazoffofj]] || [[word:kazoffofsh|kazoffofsh]] || [[word:kazoffof|kazoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kazofotho|kazofotho]] || [[word:kazofojo|kazofojo]] || [[word:kazofosho|kazofosho]] || [[word:kazofoko|kazofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kazofoth|kazofoth]] || [[word:kazofoj|kazofoj]] || [[word:kazofosh|kazofosh]] || [[word:kazofo|kazofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kazofothol|kazofothol]] || [[word:kazofojol|kazofojol]] || [[word:kazofoshol|kazofoshol]] || [[word:kazofokol|kazofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kazofoothotho|kazofoothotho]] || [[word:kazofoojojo|kazofoojojo]] || [[word:kazofooshosho|kazofooshosho]] || [[word:kazofooko|kazofooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kazofothon|kazofothon]] || [[word:kazofojon|kazofojon]] || [[word:kazofoshon|kazofoshon]] || [[word:kazofokon|kazofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kazofothooro|kazofothooro]] || [[word:kazofojooro|kazofojooro]] || [[word:kazofoshooro|kazofoshooro]] || [[word:kazofokooro|kazofokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
